rationale.R1.6: The review identifies several areas for improvement in the writing style, suggesting concrete revisions to enhance clarity and conciseness.
rationale.RX.1: The review acknowledges that the text presents claims with varying degrees of confidence but does not explicitly mark uncertainty for specific recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The review focuses on the content of the section and doesn't indicate any deviation from the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: The review highlights potential issues with the empirical claims, suggesting that some results might be overstated or require further investigation.
rationale.RX.5: The review does not discuss the provenance or traceability of the information presented in the text.
